name: What if the ladder was my fault in the fall at my job in Saint George?
description: Comp pays regardless of your fault—it's no-fault insurance.

mainEntity.name: What if the ladder was my fault in the fall at my job in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp pays regardless of your fault—it's no-fault insurance.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Workers' comp is no-fault**—your partial blame doesn't bar benefits in Utah/Idaho.[1][6]

Covers treatment/wages anyway; negligence only affects third-party suits.

- Admit no fault to adjusters.
- Focus on injury facts.

If employer at fault (bad ladder), comp still primary; sue others separately.

Attorneys shield you from blame games.
